content: Psychotherapy is first-line: Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT) has strongest evidence, targeting emotion regulation, distress tolerance, interpersonal effectiveness, mindfulness through individual therapy, skills groups, phone coaching, therapist consultation team. Other effective therapies: Mentalization-Based Treatment (MBT), Transference-Focused Psychotherapy (TFP), Schema-Focused Therapy. No medications approved specifically for BPD; pharmacotherapy targets specific symptoms (mood stabilizers for affective instability, atypical antipsychotics for cognitive-perceptual symptoms, SSRIs for comorbid depression/anxiety). Avoid polypharmacy. Hospitalization reserved for acute safety crises. Long-term prognosis generally favorable with appropriate treatment.
